title: MEG-BIDS Brainstorm data sample
description: A single-subject MEG dataset acquired during an auditory oddball paradigm using a CTF 275 system at 2400 Hz sampling rate. The dataset comprises two 6-minute runs with 200 standard tones (440 Hz) and 40 deviant tones (554.4 Hz) per run, along with empty room recordings and anatomical MRI data. This tutorial dataset serves as a reference implementation for the Brainstorm neuroimaging software and includes detailed documentation of stimulus timing delays and head digitization.
methods_description: MEG acquisition performed at 2400 Hz using a CTF 275 system with 274 axial gradiometers, 26 reference sensors, 2 EEG electrodes (Cz, Pz), ECG, EOG, and head tracking channels. Auditory stimuli (440 Hz standard and 554.4 Hz deviant tones) delivered binaurally via intra-aural earphones with random inter-stimulus intervals (0.7-1.7 s). Subject performed button-press responses to deviant tones. Head shape and fiducial points digitized using Polhemus Fastrak. Anatomical MRI acquired at 1.5T and processed with FreeSurfer 5.3.
